block_00: What it takes to be a successful trader
block_01: Ever wondered what separates great traders from the rest? Turns out there are certain qualities and tools shown to help boost trading performance.
block_03: Given that the market is constantly changing, traders need to be able to adapt to new conditions and make quick decisions. Otherwise, a good opportunity can be lost.
block_05: Do you prefer technical or fundamental analysis? Maybe a combination of both? Great traders develop their strategy over time, tailoring it to their trading experience and style.
block_07: Knowing how to walk away from a losing trade is crucial to success. Without a proper risk management strategy, your losses can add up before you know it.
block_08: Want more info on what makes a successful trader?
